example_sentence: She heard a strange noise coming from outside the house.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने घर के बाहर से एक अजीब आवाज़ सुनी।

english_meaning: a portion of something; to separate
definition_simple: A portion or piece of a whole; to separate or divide.
definition_detailed: 'Part' as a noun means a portion ('part of the plan'), a role ('play a part'), or a region ('the northern part'). As a verb it means to separate ('they parted ways'). 'Part-time' means less than full hours. Many expressions: 'take part', 'for the most part', 'in part', 'part with'.
example_sentence: She played an important part in the success of the project.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने परियोजना की सफलता में एक महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका निभाई।

english_meaning: a large amount of; to a great degree
definition_simple: A large quantity of (uncountable); to a great degree or extent.
definition_detailed: 'Much' is used with uncountable nouns ('much water', 'much effort') and as an adverb meaning 'to a great degree' ('much better', 'much appreciated'). In positive sentences it is often replaced by 'a lot', while 'much' is preferred in questions and negatives. Its comparative is 'more' and superlative 'most'.
example_sentence: She didn't have much time to prepare for the final presentation.
example_sentence_hindi: उसके पास अंतिम प्रस्तुति की तैयारी के लिए ज़्यादा समय नहीं था।

english_meaning: not the same as another; unlike in nature or quality
definition_simple: Not the same; having distinct qualities or nature.
definition_detailed: 'Different' means not alike ('a different approach'). It is followed by 'from' in standard English ('different from'), though 'different than' is common in American English and 'different to' in British English. The adverb is 'differently' and the noun 'difference'.
example_sentence: She uses a completely different approach to solve each problem.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हर समस्या को हल करने के लिए बिल्कुल अलग तरीके का उपयोग करती है।

english_meaning: to or at a distance from a place or person
definition_simple: At a distance; in another direction; from this place.
definition_detailed: 'Away' indicates distance or departure from a place ('walked away'), absence ('she is away this week'), removal ('throw away'), and continuing action ('working away'). As an adjective in sports it describes a match played at the opponent's venue ('an away game'). Many phrasal verbs use 'away'.
example_sentence: She moved away from the city to live in the countryside.
example_sentence_hindi: वह शहर से दूर जाकर ग्रामीण क्षेत्र में रहने लगी।

english_meaning: to make or become different; an alteration
definition_simple: To make or become different; an instance of becoming different.
definition_detailed: 'Change' as a verb means to make different ('change a plan'), to become different ('weather changes'), or to replace ('change clothes'). As a noun it refers to the act of becoming different, a substitution, or coins as small currency. 'Change' is central to concepts of transformation and progress.
example_sentence: She changed her career path after years of careful thinking.
example_sentence_hindi: वर्षों की सोच के बाद उसने अपने करियर का रास्ता बदला।

english_meaning: with each other; in combination; at the same place or time
definition_simple: With or in proximity to another person or thing; jointly.
definition_detailed: 'Together' indicates joint action ('work together'), simultaneous occurrence ('they arrived together'), combined ('tied together'), and as an adjective it means organized and calm ('she's very together'). Many idioms: 'get-together', 'pull together', 'put together', 'together with'.
example_sentence: They worked together to complete the challenging project on time.
example_sentence_hindi: उन्होंने मिलकर चुनौतीपूर्ण परियोजना को समय पर पूरा किया।

english_meaning: to retain or maintain possession of; to continue
definition_simple: To retain; to continue a state or action; to store.
definition_detailed: 'Keep' means to retain ('keep a secret'), maintain a state ('keep clean'), continue ('keep going'), cause to remain ('keep someone waiting'), and store ('keep files'). Its irregular past tense is 'kept'. Many phrasal verbs: 'keep up', 'keep on', 'keep away', 'keep to'. 'Keep' also means a fortress tower.
example_sentence: She always keeps her promises and never lets people down.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हमेशा अपने वादे निभाती है और कभी लोगों को निराश नहीं करती।

english_meaning: a unit of language; speech or talk
definition_simple: A unit of language that has meaning; something said.
definition_detailed: 'Word' primarily means a unit of spoken or written language ('a three-letter word'). It also refers to speech or communication ('have a word'), a promise ('give your word'), news ('word spread'), and a command ('give the word'). In religious contexts, 'the Word' refers to sacred scripture.
example_sentence: She chose every word carefully when writing her speech.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने अपना भाषण लिखते समय हर शब्द सावधानी से चुना।

english_meaning: to place something in a position
definition_simple: To place something in a particular location or position.
definition_detailed: 'Put' means to place in a position ('put the book down'), cause to be in a state ('put at risk'), express ('how to put it'), and invest effort ('put in work'). Its past tense is 'put' (unchanged). Extremely productive in phrasal verbs: 'put on', 'put off', 'put up', 'put down', 'put forward'.
example_sentence: She put all her effort into preparing for the big exam.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने बड़ी परीक्षा की तैयारी में अपनी पूरी मेहनत लगा दी।

english_meaning: the number 4
definition_simple: The number 4; one more than three.
definition_detailed: 'Four' is the cardinal number 4. The ordinal form is 'fourth'. It appears in many expressions and compounds: 'four-leaf clover', 'four-wheel drive', 'on all fours'. 'Forty' and 'fourteen' are derived from 'four'. Many cultures have special significance for the number four.
example_sentence: She needs to buy four more chairs for her new dining room.
example_sentence_hindi: उसे अपने नए डाइनिंग रूम के लिए चार और कुर्सियाँ खरीदनी हैं।

english_meaning: to make it easier for someone to do something
definition_simple: To assist or support someone in doing something.
definition_detailed: 'Help' as a verb means to assist ('help a friend'), make easier ('this will help'), and in informal English can be followed by an infinitive with or without 'to' ('help do' or 'help to do'). As a noun it means assistance ('I need help'). 'Help yourself' means to take what you want. 'Can't help' means unable to control.
example_sentence: She always helps her younger classmates when they have difficulty.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हमेशा अपने छोटे सहपाठियों की मदद करती है जब उन्हें कठिनाई होती है।

english_meaning: to name something; to telephone; to summon
definition_simple: To give a name to; to telephone; to shout to get attention.
definition_detailed: 'Call' means to name ('she is called Anna'), to telephone ('call me tonight'), to shout ('call for help'), to summon ('call a meeting'), and to visit briefly ('call in'). As a noun it refers to a phone call, a shout, or a demand ('a call for action'). 'Call it a day' means to stop working.
example_sentence: She called her mother every evening after arriving home from work.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हर शाम काम से घर आने के बाद अपनी माँ को फोन करती थी।

english_meaning: below or beneath; less than a number or level
definition_simple: Below the surface or level of something; less than a number.
definition_detailed: 'Under' indicates position below something ('under the table'), less than a number ('under thirty'), subordination ('under management'), and ongoing process ('under construction'). Contrasts with 'over' for position and 'above' for level. Many compounds: 'understand', 'underline', 'undermine'.
example_sentence: She kept her important documents safely under the wooden desk.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने अपने महत्वपूर्ण दस्तावेज लकड़ी की मेज के नीचे सुरक्षित रखे।

english_meaning: in opposition to; in contact with
definition_simple: In opposition to; leaning or pressing on the surface of.
definition_detailed: 'Against' expresses opposition ('vote against'), physical contact with ('lean against'), contrast ('bright against dark'), comparison ('judged against'), and protection ('insured against'). It always implies some kind of opposition, resistance, or confrontation — physical, competitive, or ideological.
example_sentence: She always fights against injustice wherever she finds it.
example_sentence_hindi: वह जहाँ भी अन्याय पाती है, उसके विरुद्ध हमेशा लड़ती है।

english_meaning: earlier than; in front of; in advance of
definition_simple: Earlier in time; in front of something; already.
definition_detailed: 'Before' as a preposition means earlier than ('before Monday'), in front of ('before the judge'), and in preference to ('honor before wealth'). As a conjunction it introduces a time clause ('before she left'). As an adverb it means 'at a previous time' ('I've seen it before'). Contrasts with 'after'.
example_sentence: She always reads the instructions before starting any new task.
example_sentence_hindi: वह कोई भी नया काम शुरू करने से पहले हमेशा निर्देश पढ़ती है।

english_meaning: the place where one lives; one's country or origin
definition_simple: The place where a person lives; a place of belonging.
definition_detailed: 'Home' refers to the place where one lives ('come home'), one's native land ('home country'), a place of origin for a sports team ('home game'), and metaphorically a comfortable familiar place ('feel at home'). As an adjective 'home' modifies nouns ('home cooking', 'home game'). Many compounds exist.
example_sentence: She finally returned home after many years working abroad.
example_sentence_hindi: कई साल विदेश में काम करने के बाद वह आखिरकार घर लौट आई।

english_meaning: to be alive; to reside in a place
definition_simple: To be alive; to reside in a particular place.
definition_detailed: 'Live' as a verb (/lɪv/) means to be alive ('every being that lives'), to reside ('she lives in London'), and to experience ('live in fear'). As an adjective (/laɪv/) it means 'not recorded, happening now' ('a live concert') or 'not yet used' ('a live wire'). The pronunciation distinguishes these two meanings.
example_sentence: She has lived in this city for most of her entire life.
example_sentence_hindi: वह अपने अधिकांश जीवन के लिए इस शहर में रही है।

english_meaning: of limited size; minor or unimportant
definition_simple: Of a limited size, extent, or amount; not large.
definition_detailed: 'Small' describes limited size ('a small room'), minor scale ('a small problem'), and insignificant amount ('a small difference'). It is the informal counterpart of 'little' (with an emotional connotation) and the antonym of 'large' or 'big'. Many compounds: 'small-scale', 'small talk', 'smallpox'.
example_sentence: She made a small mistake but quickly corrected it herself.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने एक छोटी गलती की लेकिन जल्दी ही उसे खुद सुधार लिया।

english_meaning: a mathematical value; a quantity; an issue of a publication
definition_simple: A mathematical quantity used to count or measure; a figure.
definition_detailed: 'Number' as a noun means a mathematical value ('the number five'), a quantity ('a number of people'), a numeral symbol, and a particular issue of a magazine ('the latest number'). As a verb it means to give numbers to ('numbered the pages') or to amount to ('they numbered fifty').
example_sentence: She wrote down the exact number of items on her shopping list.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने अपनी शॉपिंग सूची में वस्तुओं की सटीक संख्या लिखी।

english_meaning: to put in place; a group of things; hardened
definition_simple: To place or arrange; a collection of related items; to become solid.
definition_detailed: 'Set' as a verb means to place ('set the table'), establish ('set a rule'), adjust ('set the alarm'), and harden ('the cement sets'). As a noun it is a collection ('a set of tools'). Note: 'set' is one of the verbs with the same form in present and past tense. Many compounds and phrasal verbs.
example_sentence: She set a new record in the school's annual athletics competition.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने स्कूल की वार्षिक एथलेटिक्स प्रतियोगिता में एक नया रिकॉर्ड स्थापित किया।

english_meaning: a group of related people; parents and children
definition_simple: A group of people related by blood, marriage, or adoption; parents and children.
definition_detailed: 'Family' refers to the basic social unit of parents and children, extended relatives ('the whole family'), groups of related species ('the cat family'), or any close-knit group ('we're like family'). Family can be nuclear (parents + children) or extended (including grandparents, aunts, uncles, etc.).
example_sentence: Her family always gathers for a big meal on important holidays.
example_sentence_hindi: उसका परिवार हमेशा महत्वपूर्ण त्योहारों पर एक बड़े भोजन के लिए इकट्ठा होता है।

english_meaning: the physical structure of a person or animal
definition_simple: The complete physical structure of a living organism.
definition_detailed: 'Body' refers to the physical structure ('the human body'), a corpse ('a body was found'), a main part ('the body of the document'), a group ('a body of people'), and a celestial object ('a body in space'). As an adjective 'bodily' means relating to the body. Many compounds: 'bodyguard', 'body language'.
example_sentence: She takes excellent care of her body through exercise and nutrition.
example_sentence_hindi: वह व्यायाम और पोषण के माध्यम से अपने शरीर की बहुत अच्छी देखभाल करती है।

english_meaning: vocal or instrumental sounds organized in a pleasing way
definition_simple: Sound organized in a pleasing pattern with melody, rhythm, and harmony.
definition_detailed: 'Music' is the art of organizing sound to create pleasing patterns with elements like melody, rhythm, and harmony. It encompasses all genres and traditions from classical to pop. As an uncountable noun it doesn't take a plural. The adjective is 'musical', the person 'musician', and 'musical' can also be a noun (a musical show).
example_sentence: She listens to classical music every morning while drinking coffee.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हर सुबह कॉफी पीते हुए शास्त्रीय संगीत सुनती है।

english_meaning: the property of objects producing different sensations on the eye
definition_simple: A visual property produced by different wavelengths of light; a hue.
definition_detailed: 'Color' (American English; 'colour' in British English) refers to the visual property of objects as perceived by light reflection. Primary colors are red, yellow, and blue (traditional) or red, green, and blue (light). As a verb 'color' means to add color to. Metaphorically it means to influence ('colored by bias').
example_sentence: She chose a bright yellow color to paint her bedroom walls.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने अपने बेडरूम की दीवारें रंगने के लिए चमकीला पीला रंग चुना।

english_meaning: to experience an emotion; to perceive by touch
definition_simple: To be aware of an emotion or physical sensation.
definition_detailed: 'Feel' means to experience emotion ('I feel happy'), to perceive by touch ('feel the texture'), to think or believe ('I feel that...'), and to seem ('it feels cold'). Its irregular past tense is 'felt'. The noun 'feeling' refers to an emotion or sensation. 'Feel like' means to want or to seem.
example_sentence: She felt a sense of pride when she finished the difficult course.
example_sentence_hindi: जब उसने कठिन पाठ्यक्रम पूरा किया तो उसे गर्व की अनुभूति हुई।

english_meaning: to change position; to affect emotionally
definition_simple: To go from one place to another; to affect someone emotionally.
definition_detailed: 'Move' means to change position ('the car moved'), to transfer ('move to a new city'), to affect emotionally ('the story moved her'), to make a formal proposal ('move a motion'), and as a noun means a strategic action in a game. Many phrasal verbs: 'move on', 'move in', 'move out'.
example_sentence: She was deeply moved by the heartfelt performance of the singer.
example_sentence_hindi: वह गायक के हार्दिक प्रदर्शन से गहराई से प्रभावित हुई।

english_meaning: to engage in activities for enjoyment; to perform in a sport
definition_simple: To engage in games or activities for enjoyment; to perform music or a role.
definition_detailed: 'Play' means to engage in games ('play chess'), perform music ('play the guitar'), act a role ('play a character'), and operate a device ('play a video'). As a noun it refers to a theatrical performance ('a Shakespeare play'). Many expressions: 'fair play', 'play safe', 'play a part', 'wordplay'.
example_sentence: The children love to play outside in the park after school.
example_sentence_hindi: बच्चे स्कूल के बाद पार्क में बाहर खेलना पसंद करते हैं।

english_meaning: the period of darkness between sunset and sunrise
definition_simple: The period of darkness each day between sunset and sunrise.
definition_detailed: 'Night' refers to the period of darkness from dusk to dawn. As an adverb ('nights') it means regularly at nighttime. Many compounds: 'nightmare', 'midnight', 'overnight', 'fortnight' (two weeks, from 'fourteen nights'). Common idioms: 'good night', 'night owl', 'night shift', 'stay the night'.
example_sentence: She worked late into the night to finish her important report.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने अपनी महत्वपूर्ण रिपोर्ट पूरी करने के लिए रात देर तक काम किया।

english_meaning: at or to a great distance; much or by a long way
definition_simple: At a great distance in space or time; to a considerable degree.
definition_detailed: 'Far' as an adverb means 'to or at a great distance' ('how far?', 'far away'), 'to a great extent' ('far better'), and 'a long time in the past or future' ('far back'). As an adjective 'far' means distant ('the far side'). 'Farther/further' are comparative forms; 'farthest/furthest' are superlatives.
example_sentence: She traveled far from home to pursue her dream of studying abroad.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने विदेश में पढ़ाई के अपने सपने को पूरा करने के लिए घर से बहुत दूर यात्रा की।

english_meaning: the organ of sight; visual attention
definition_simple: The organ used for seeing; attention or observation.
definition_detailed: 'Eye' primarily refers to the organ of vision. As a verb it means to look at carefully ('she eyed the situation'). Many idioms: 'eye contact', 'eye-catching', 'keep an eye on', 'see eye to eye', 'bird's-eye view', 'in the public eye'. The plural 'eyes' can mean watchful attention.
example_sentence: She has a good eye for detail and rarely makes mistakes.
example_sentence_hindi: उसकी विस्तार पर अच्छी नजर है और वह शायद ही कभी गलती करती है।

english_meaning: a sentence asking for information; to ask or doubt
definition_simple: A statement used to obtain information; to ask or express doubt.
definition_detailed: 'Question' as a noun is a sentence requesting information ('ask a question'), a matter being considered ('the question of climate'), and a doubt ('no question of guilt'). As a verb it means to ask ('the police questioned him') and to doubt ('I question whether it's true'). 'Question mark' is the ? punctuation.
example_sentence: She raised an interesting question during the morning team meeting.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने सुबह की टीम बैठक के दौरान एक दिलचस्प सवाल उठाया।

english_meaning: another time; returning to a previous state
definition_simple: One more time; returning to a previous state or activity.
definition_detailed: 'Again' means 'one more time' or 'returning to a previous state' ('start again', 'she's healthy again'). Combined with 'never' it means 'not at any future time' ('never again'). 'Once again' emphasizes repetition. 'Again and again' means repeatedly. It commonly follows the verb it modifies.
example_sentence: She tried the difficult recipe again and it turned out perfect.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने मुश्किल रेसिपी फिर से आजमाई और यह बिल्कुल सही बनी।

english_meaning: to make an effort to do something
definition_simple: To make an effort or attempt to do something.
definition_detailed: 'Try' means to make an effort ('try your best'), to test ('try a new method'), to sample ('try the food'), and in legal terms to bring a case before a judge ('try a case'). The idiom 'try on' means to test clothing. 'Tried and tested' means proven to work.
example_sentence: She always tries her best no matter how challenging the task is.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हमेशा अपना सर्वश्रेष्ठ प्रयास करती है चाहे काम कितना भी चुनौतीपूर्ण हो।

english_meaning: to communicate information; to instruct
definition_simple: To communicate information or give instructions to someone.
definition_detailed: 'Tell' means to communicate ('tell a story'), to instruct ('tell someone to do'), to distinguish ('tell the difference'), and to reveal ('time will tell'). Its irregular past tense is 'told'. Contrasts with 'say' (direct quotation focus) and 'speak' (skill/language focus). 'Tell off' means to reprimand.
example_sentence: She told her students the importance of reading every single day.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने अपने छात्रों को हर एक दिन पढ़ने के महत्व के बारे में बताया।

english_meaning: a male child or young man
definition_simple: A male child; a son; a young man.
definition_detailed: 'Boy' refers to a male child ('a young boy'), a son ('that's my boy'), an informal term for a man in certain contexts ('the boys at work'), and a servant or subordinate in older usage (now considered offensive). 'Boyfriend' means a romantic male partner. 'Old boy' refers to a former student.
example_sentence: The boy carefully built a tower of colorful wooden blocks.
example_sentence_hindi: लड़के ने ध्यान से रंगीन लकड़ी के ब्लॉकों का एक टॉवर बनाया।

english_meaning: to come or go after; to obey or subscribe to
definition_simple: To go after someone; to obey instructions; to understand.
definition_detailed: 'Follow' means to go after ('follow the path'), to come after in sequence ('spring follows winter'), to obey ('follow orders'), to understand ('can you follow?'), and to subscribe to ('follow on social media'). Many phrasal verbs: 'follow up', 'follow through', 'follow along'.
example_sentence: She decided to follow her passion for art despite others' doubts.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने दूसरों के संदेह के बावजूद कला के प्रति अपने जुनून का अनुसरण करने का फैसला किया।

english_meaning: a part of a building enclosed by walls; space
definition_simple: An enclosed area within a building; available space.
definition_detailed: 'Room' refers to an enclosed space in a building ('the living room'), available space or scope ('room to grow', 'room for improvement'), and can mean a lodging or accommodation ('rent a room'). Many compounds: 'bedroom', 'bathroom', 'classroom'. 'Make room' means to create space.
example_sentence: She arranged the furniture to make the small room look bigger.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने छोटे कमरे को बड़ा दिखाने के लिए फर्नीचर व्यवस्थित किया।

english_meaning: to shut; to end; to be near
definition_simple: To shut something; to bring to an end; near in distance or relationship.
definition_detailed: 'Close' as a verb (/kloʊz/) means to shut ('close the door'), to end ('close a meeting'), or to narrow a gap ('close the distance'). As an adjective (/kloʊs/) it means near in distance ('a close call'), intimate ('a close friend'), or careful ('close attention'). Note the different pronunciation for verb vs. adjective.
example_sentence: She closed the laptop and went to enjoy the sunny afternoon outside.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने लैपटॉप बंद किया और धूप भरी दोपहर का आनंद लेने बाहर गई।

english_meaning: a specific fact, idea, or location; to indicate direction
definition_simple: A specific fact, idea, or location; to direct attention toward something.
definition_detailed: 'Point' as a noun means a specific place ('point on a map'), a fact or idea ('make a point'), a score unit ('three points'), a purpose ('what's the point?'), and the sharp tip of something. As a verb it means to direct toward ('point at'). Many compounds: 'viewpoint', 'standpoint', 'checkpoint'.
example_sentence: She made an excellent point during the discussion about education policy.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने शिक्षा नीति पर चर्चा के दौरान एक बेहतरीन बात कही।

english_meaning: a large town; a major urban area
definition_simple: A large permanent settlement; a major urban center.
definition_detailed: 'City' refers to a large urban settlement, typically with its own government ('the city of London'). It is larger than a town and smaller than a metropolis, though definitions vary by country. 'City' often implies density, culture, commerce, and opportunity. 'Inner city' refers to older central districts.
example_sentence: She moved to the big city to find better career opportunities.
example_sentence_hindi: वह बेहतर करियर के अवसर ढूंढने के लिए बड़े शहर में चली गई।

english_meaning: the number 5
definition_simple: The number 5; one more than four.
definition_detailed: 'Five' is the cardinal number 5. The ordinal form is 'fifth'. 'High five' is a celebratory gesture. 'Take five' is an idiom meaning 'take a short break'. 'Nine to five' refers to standard office hours. 'Fifteen' and 'fifty' are derived from 'five'.
example_sentence: She needs to buy five fresh vegetables from the market today.
example_sentence_hindi: उसे आज बाजार से पाँच ताजी सब्जियाँ खरीदनी हैं।

english_meaning: each individual of a group; all members
definition_simple: Each individual one of all the members of a group.
definition_detailed: 'Every' indicates all members of a group individually ('every student'). It always takes a singular noun and verb ('every person is'). Contrasts with 'all' (collective). 'Every other' means alternate. 'Every now and then' means occasionally. 'Everyday' (adjective) means ordinary; 'every day' (adverb) means each day.
example_sentence: She exercises for thirty minutes every morning before going to work.
example_sentence_hindi: वह काम पर जाने से पहले हर सुबह तीस मिनट व्यायाम करती है।

english_meaning: to rest on one's buttocks; to be located
definition_simple: To rest in a seated position; to be in a specified position.
definition_detailed: 'Sit' means to be in a seated position ('sit on a chair'), to be located ('the town sits in a valley'), and in formal contexts to be in session ('parliament sits tomorrow'). Its irregular past tense is 'sat'. Phrasal verbs: 'sit down', 'sit up', 'sit in for', 'sit on'.
example_sentence: She sat quietly by the window and read her favorite book.
example_sentence_hindi: वह खिड़की के पास चुपचाप बैठ गई और अपनी पसंदीदा किताब पढ़ने लगी।

english_meaning: the invisible gaseous substance around the Earth
definition_simple: The mixture of gases that surrounds the Earth; the open space above ground.
definition_detailed: 'Air' refers to the gaseous atmosphere surrounding Earth, primarily nitrogen and oxygen. It means the open space above ('up in the air'), appearance or manner ('an air of confidence'), broadcasting ('on air'), and social manner ('airs and graces'). As a verb it means to ventilate or broadcast.
example_sentence: She opened the windows to let some fresh air into the room.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने कमरे में ताजी हवा आने देने के लिए खिड़कियाँ खोलीं।

english_meaning: past tense of know
definition_simple: The past tense of 'know': to have had knowledge of something.
definition_detailed: 'Knew' is the past tense of 'know', indicating past knowledge or awareness ('she knew the answer'). It can express past familiarity ('I knew her years ago'), past realization ('I knew it!'), and past acknowledgment ('we knew the risks'). The past participle is 'known'. 'Unknown' and 'well-known' are derived forms.
example_sentence: She knew the answer before the teacher finished asking the question.
example_sentence_hindi: शिक्षक ने प्रश्न पूछना समाप्त करने से पहले ही वह उत्तर जानती थी।

english_meaning: the number 6
definition_simple: The number 6; one more than five.
definition_detailed: 'Six' is the cardinal number 6. Ordinal: 'sixth'. Common idioms: 'six of one and half a dozen of the other' (equally balanced), 'at sixes and sevens' (in disarray), 'six-pack' (a set of six), 'sixth sense' (intuition beyond the five senses).
example_sentence: She planted six different kinds of flowers in her garden.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने अपने बगीचे में छह विभिन्न प्रकार के फूल लगाए।

english_meaning: the number 7
definition_simple: The number 7; one more than six.
definition_detailed: 'Seven' is the cardinal number 7. Ordinal: 'seventh'. Seven has strong cultural significance: 'Seven Wonders of the World', 'seven deadly sins', 'seven days of the week'. 'Seventh heaven' means perfect happiness. 'Seventy' and 'seventeen' are derived from 'seven'.
example_sentence: She finished reading all seven chapters before going to sleep.
example_sentence_hindi: सोने जाने से पहले उसने सभी सात अध्याय पढ़ लिए।

english_meaning: the number 8
definition_simple: The number 8; one more than seven.
definition_detailed: 'Eight' is the cardinal number 8. Ordinal: 'eighth'. 'Figure eight' is the numeral 8 shape used in skating. 'Behind the eight ball' means in a difficult position (from pool/billiards). 'Eighty' and 'eighteen' are derived from 'eight'. Octagon and octave are related to the Latin/Greek equivalent.
example_sentence: She finished all eight tasks on her to-do list before noon.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने दोपहर से पहले अपनी टू-डू सूची के सभी आठ काम पूरे किए।

english_meaning: plural of child; young people
definition_simple: Young people in general; plural of 'child'.
definition_detailed: 'Children' is the irregular plural of 'child'. It refers to young people generally or one's own sons and daughters. 'Childhood' is the period of being a child. 'Childish' means immature; 'childlike' means innocently simple. Many compound words begin with 'child': 'childcare', 'childbirth', 'child-proof'.
example_sentence: The children laughed and played happily in the school playground.
example_sentence_hindi: बच्चे स्कूल के खेल के मैदान में खुशी से हँसे और खेले।

english_meaning: to start; to come into existence
definition_simple: To start something; to take the first step.
definition_detailed: 'Begin' means to start ('begin a project'). Its irregular past tense is 'began' and past participle 'begun'. It is slightly more formal than 'start'. Can be followed by a gerund or infinitive with little meaning difference ('begin to work' or 'begin working'). 'Beginning' as a noun means the start.
example_sentence: She began her presentation by thanking everyone for attending.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने उपस्थित सभी लोगों का धन्यवाद करते हुए अपनी प्रस्तुति शुरू की।

english_meaning: having lived for a short time; not old
definition_simple: Having lived for a relatively short time; not yet old.
definition_detailed: 'Young' describes living beings or things that have existed for a short time ('a young child', 'a young company'). As a noun 'the young' refers to young people. 'Young at heart' means feeling young despite age. 'Youngster' means a young person.
example_sentence: She has always supported young people who want to study abroad.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने हमेशा उन युवा लोगों का समर्थन किया है जो विदेश में पढ़ना चाहते हैं।

english_meaning: to go away from; to cause to remain; to allow
definition_simple: To go away from a place; to allow something to remain.
definition_detailed: 'Leave' means to go away from ('leave the house'), to cause to remain ('leave it there'), to allow ('leave me alone'), to bequeath ('leave money in a will'), and as a noun 'leave' means an authorized absence ('sick leave', 'on leave'). Its irregular past tense is 'left'.
example_sentence: She left the meeting early because she had another appointment.
example_sentence_hindi: उसके एक और मुलाकात होने के कारण वह बैठक जल्दी छोड़ गई।

english_meaning: the solid surface of the Earth; a country; to arrive on ground
definition_simple: The solid surface of the earth; a country or territory; to arrive on the ground.
definition_detailed: 'Land' as a noun refers to the solid ground of the earth, as opposed to water ('on land'), a country or territory ('a distant land'), agricultural ground ('farm land'). As a verb it means to arrive on the ground ('the plane landed'), to bring a fish onto land ('land a catch'), or to obtain ('land a job').
example_sentence: The plane landed safely at the airport after a long flight.
example_sentence_hindi: एक लंबी उड़ान के बाद विमान हवाई अड्डे पर सुरक्षित उतरा।

english_meaning: an institution for education; a group sharing a style
definition_simple: An institution where people learn; a period of education.
definition_detailed: 'School' refers to an educational institution ('attend school'), the period of being in school ('during school'), and a group sharing a method or style ('the Flemish school of painting'). 'School of thought' refers to a group with a shared viewpoint. As a verb 'school' means to educate or train.
example_sentence: She teaches mathematics at a highly regarded secondary school.
example_sentence_hindi: वह एक अत्यधिक प्रतिष्ठित माध्यमिक विद्यालय में गणित पढ़ाती है।

english_meaning: to increase in size; to develop; to cultivate
definition_simple: To increase in size or amount; to develop; to cultivate plants.
definition_detailed: 'Grow' means to increase in size ('the tree grew'), to develop ('grow as a person'), to cultivate ('grow vegetables'), and to become ('grow tired'). Its irregular past tense is 'grew' and past participle 'grown'. 'Grow up' means to become an adult. 'Grown-up' means an adult or mature person.
example_sentence: She grows fresh vegetables in her backyard garden every summer.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हर गर्मियों में अपने पिछवाड़े के बगीचे में ताजी सब्जियाँ उगाती है।

english_meaning: to devote time and attention to learning
definition_simple: To apply the mind to learning about a subject or skill.
definition_detailed: 'Study' as a verb means to learn ('study medicine'), to observe ('study the stars'), and to analyze ('study the data'). As a noun it is the act of learning, a research report ('a study shows'), or a room for working. 'Studies' often refers to academic subjects. 'Studious' means diligent in study.
example_sentence: She studied hard for three months before taking her final exams.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने अपनी अंतिम परीक्षाएँ देने से पहले तीन महीने तक कड़ी मेहनत से पढ़ाई की।

english_meaning: to gain knowledge or skill through study or experience
definition_simple: To gain knowledge or a skill through experience or study.
definition_detailed: 'Learn' means to acquire knowledge ('learn a language'), to find out ('learn the truth'), and to memorize ('learn a poem by heart'). Both 'learned' and 'learnt' are acceptable past tenses; 'learned' is preferred in American English, 'learnt' in British English. 'Lifelong learning' means continuing to learn throughout life.
example_sentence: She has always loved to learn new skills in her free time.
example_sentence_hindi: उसे हमेशा अपने खाली समय में नए कौशल सीखना पसंद रहा है।

english_meaning: a living organism with roots, stem, and leaves; a factory; to put in the ground
definition_simple: A living organism that grows in soil; a factory; to put into the ground.
definition_detailed: 'Plant' as a noun refers to a living organism ('a plant in the garden'), a factory or industrial facility ('a manufacturing plant'), or something deliberately placed ('a plant in the audience'). As a verb it means to put seeds or plants in the ground, to place deliberately, or to set up an installation.
example_sentence: She planted several flowering plants along the front garden path.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने सामने के बगीचे के रास्ते के किनारे कई फूलों के पौधे लगाए।

english_meaning: the star at the center of the solar system
definition_simple: The star at the center of our solar system that provides light and heat.
definition_detailed: 'Sun' refers to the star at the center of the solar system ('the Sun'), sunlight generally ('plenty of sun'), and as a verb means to expose to sunlight ('sun yourself on the beach'). Capitalized 'Sun' when referring specifically to Earth's star. Many compounds: 'sunrise', 'sunset', 'sunflower', 'sunshine'.
example_sentence: She loves sitting outside to enjoy the warmth of the morning sun.
example_sentence_hindi: वह सुबह की धूप की गर्माहट का आनंद लेने के लिए बाहर बैठना पसंद करती है।

english_meaning: electromagnetic radiation visible to the eye; not heavy
definition_simple: The natural or artificial electromagnetic radiation visible to the human eye; not heavy.
definition_detailed: 'Light' as a noun refers to visible electromagnetic radiation ('sunlight'), a source of light ('a lamp'), knowledge ('shed light on'), and celebrity ('in the public light'). As an adjective it means 'not heavy' ('a light bag'), 'pale in color' ('light blue'), or 'not intense' ('a light meal'). As a verb it means to illuminate or ignite.
example_sentence: She turned on the light and started reading her book carefully.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने लाइट जलाई और ध्यान से अपनी किताब पढ़ने लगी।

english_meaning: the sound produced in a person's throat when speaking
definition_simple: The sound produced when speaking or singing; an expressed opinion.
definition_detailed: 'Voice' refers to the sound produced in speech or singing ('a beautiful voice'), an expressed opinion ('give voice to'), in grammar the relationship between verb and subject (active/passive voice), and in music the individual melodic part. As a verb it means to express or articulate ('voice an opinion').
example_sentence: She has a beautiful voice and performs at local concerts regularly.
example_sentence_hindi: उसकी एक सुंदर आवाज़ है और वह नियमित रूप से स्थानीय संगीत कार्यक्रमों में प्रस्तुति देती है।

english_meaning: the ability to do something; strength or authority
definition_simple: The ability or capacity to do something; strength; authority.
definition_detailed: 'Power' refers to physical strength ('muscle power'), authority ('political power'), energy supply ('electrical power'), and mathematical exponents ('2 to the power of 3'). As a verb 'power' means to supply energy to. 'Empower' means to give authority. Many compounds: 'powerhouse', 'willpower', 'horsepower'.
example_sentence: She uses her power responsibly to help people in need.
example_sentence_hindi: वह जरूरतमंद लोगों की मदद करने के लिए अपनी शक्ति का जिम्मेदारी से उपयोग करती है।

english_meaning: a settlement larger than a village but smaller than a city
definition_simple: An urban area larger than a village but smaller than a city.
definition_detailed: 'Town' refers to an urban settlement larger than a village ('a small town'), the central area of a city ('go to town'), and 'out of town' means away from one's usual location. 'Town hall' is a public meeting building. 'Township' is an administrative division.
example_sentence: She grew up in a small quiet town near the mountains.
example_sentence_hindi: वह पहाड़ों के पास एक छोटे से शांत कस्बे में पली-बढ़ी।

english_meaning: of high quality; satisfactory; thin; a penalty payment
definition_simple: Of high quality; satisfactory; very thin; a penalty payment.
definition_detailed: 'Fine' as an adjective means high quality ('fine art'), satisfactory ('I'm fine'), and very thin ('fine thread'). As a noun it is a monetary penalty ('pay a fine'). As a verb it means to impose a financial penalty ('she was fined'). 'Fine-tune' means to make small adjustments.
example_sentence: She is feeling fine after a good night's sleep and breakfast.
example_sentence_hindi: अच्छी नींद और नाश्ते के बाद वह ठीक महसूस कर रही है।

english_meaning: to operate a vehicle; to urge or compel
definition_simple: To operate and control a vehicle; to force or compel someone.
definition_detailed: 'Drive' means to operate a vehicle ('drive a car'), to urge or compel ('drive someone to success'), to hit a ball hard in sports ('drive the ball'), to power ('driven by electricity'), and as a noun to a road leading to a house or an organized effort ('a fundraising drive').
example_sentence: She drives to work every day because public transport is limited.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हर रोज काम पर गाड़ी चलाकर जाती है क्योंकि सार्वजनिक परिवहन सीमित है।

english_meaning: of little length or height; not enough
definition_simple: Having a small length or height; not lasting long; lacking enough.
definition_detailed: 'Short' describes small length ('short hair'), small height ('a short person'), brief duration ('a short break'), and insufficient quantity ('short on time', 'fall short'). Many compounds: 'shortcut', 'short-term', 'shortage'. 'Shortly' means 'soon'. 'Short-circuit' means to cause to fail by bypassing.
example_sentence: She took a short break between classes to grab a snack.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने नाश्ता लेने के लिए कक्षाओं के बीच एक छोटा ब्रेक लिया।

english_meaning: physical activity with rules done for enjoyment or competition
definition_simple: A physical activity with rules done for enjoyment or competition.
definition_detailed: 'Sport' refers to organized physical activity ('a sport like football'), fair behavior ('be a good sport'), and informally a person of that type ('he's a good sport'). In American English 'sports' is the more common form. 'Sportsmanship' refers to ethical behavior in sports. Sports can be team or individual.
example_sentence: She is very passionate about sport and trains every single day.
example_sentence_hindi: वह खेल के बारे में बहुत उत्साही है और हर रोज प्रशिक्षण लेती है।

english_meaning: coins and banknotes used as a medium of exchange
definition_simple: Currency used to purchase goods and services; wealth.
definition_detailed: 'Money' refers to currency ('save money'), wealth ('she has a lot of money'), and a resource ('money of time' — metaphorical). It is an uncountable noun in most uses. 'Monies' is a formal/legal plural. Many idioms: 'money talks', 'time is money', 'spend money like water', 'money can't buy happiness'.
example_sentence: She saves a little money each month to prepare for the future.
example_sentence_hindi: वह भविष्य की तैयारी के लिए हर महीने थोड़ा पैसा बचाती है।

english_meaning: a set of written pages bound together; to reserve
definition_simple: A set of written or printed pages bound together; to reserve a service.
definition_detailed: 'Book' as a noun is a bound collection of pages ('read a book'), a record ('the books of a company'), and a file in computing. As a verb it means to reserve ('book a hotel'). 'By the book' means following rules strictly. Many compounds: 'notebook', 'textbook', 'bookshelf'.
example_sentence: She borrowed an interesting book from the local public library.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने स्थानीय सार्वजनिक पुस्तकालय से एक दिलचस्प किताब उधार ली।

english_meaning: a word by which a person or thing is known
definition_simple: A word or term used to identify a person or thing.
definition_detailed: 'Name' as a noun refers to an identifying word ('her name is Anna'), a reputation ('make a name for yourself'), and a category ('in the name of justice'). As a verb it means to give a name to ('name the child'), to identify ('name the suspect'), or to appoint ('name her director').
example_sentence: She gave her daughter a beautiful name with a lovely meaning.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने अपनी बेटी को एक सुंदर अर्थ वाला एक सुंदर नाम दिया।

english_meaning: to cause something to go to a destination
definition_simple: To arrange for something or someone to go to another place.
definition_detailed: 'Send' means to cause to go ('send a letter'), to transmit ('send a message'), to dispatch ('send troops'), and to cause to be in a state ('it sent her crazy'). Its irregular past tense is 'sent'. Phrasal verbs: 'send out', 'send back', 'send for', 'send off'.
example_sentence: She sent a thank-you card to everyone who attended the ceremony.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने समारोह में शामिल होने वाले सभी लोगों को एक धन्यवाद कार्ड भेजा।

english_meaning: of the darkest color; without light
definition_simple: Of the darkest color; having no light or color.
definition_detailed: 'Black' describes the darkest possible color resulting from the absence of or complete absorption of light. As a noun it refers to the color black, dark-skinned people (used carefully in context), or the black side in chess. Idioms: 'black market', 'black sheep', 'in the black' (profitable).
example_sentence: She wore a black dress to the formal evening dinner party.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने औपचारिक शाम के डिनर पार्टी में एक काली पोशाक पहनी।

english_meaning: of the lightest color; reflecting all light
definition_simple: Of the lightest possible color; the color of snow.
definition_detailed: 'White' describes the lightest color, resulting from reflecting all wavelengths of light ('white snow'). As a noun it refers to the color, the white of an egg, or the light-colored pieces in chess. Idioms: 'white lie' (harmless lie), 'white-collar' (office worker), 'whiteboard'.
example_sentence: She painted the living room walls white to make them look bigger.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने लिविंग रूम की दीवारों को बड़ा दिखाने के लिए सफेद रंग से रंगा।

english_meaning: substances consumed to provide nutrition
definition_simple: Any substance eaten to provide nutrition and energy.
definition_detailed: 'Food' refers to any substance consumed by organisms for nutrition ('cook food'). It can be countable ('various foods') or uncountable ('plenty of food'). Idiom: 'food for thought' means something worth considering. Compounds: 'fast food', 'seafood', 'junk food', 'food chain'.
example_sentence: She always cooks healthy food for her family on weekends.
example_sentence_hindi: वह सप्ताहांत पर अपने परिवार के लिए हमेशा स्वस्थ भोजन बनाती है।

english_meaning: a clear liquid essential for life
definition_simple: A transparent liquid that forms rain, rivers, and seas; essential for life.
definition_detailed: 'Water' is the transparent liquid compound H₂O, essential for life. 'Waters' refers to a body of water ('the Caribbean waters'). As a verb 'water' means to pour water on plants or to add water to dilute. Idioms: 'in hot water' (in trouble), 'water under the bridge' (past problems).
example_sentence: She drinks at least eight glasses of water every single day.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हर रोज कम से कम आठ गिलास पानी पीती है।

english_meaning: a nation with its own government; the rural area
definition_simple: A nation with its own government and territory; the rural area.
definition_detailed: 'Country' refers to a nation ('a foreign country'), rural areas as opposed to cities ('move to the country'), and country music ('listening to country'). 'Countryside' is the rural landscape. 'Countrymen' are fellow citizens. 'Cross-country' refers to going over open terrain.
example_sentence: She traveled to five different countries during her summer vacation.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने गर्मियों की छुट्टियों के दौरान पाँच अलग-अलग देशों की यात्रा की।

english_meaning: to cease moving or operating; to cause to cease
definition_simple: To cease moving or operating; to bring to an end.
definition_detailed: 'Stop' means to cease movement ('stop running'), to end an activity ('stop laughing'), to prevent ('stop them'), and to stay briefly ('stop at a hotel'). It is followed by a gerund ('stop talking') not an infinitive — 'stop to talk' means to pause in order to talk. Many compounds: 'bus stop', 'stop sign'.
example_sentence: She told the children to stop making noise in the library.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने बच्चों को पुस्तकालय में शोर करना बंद करने के लिए कहा।

english_meaning: the front part of the head; to confront
definition_simple: The front part of a person's head; to confront a problem.
definition_detailed: 'Face' as a noun means the front of the head ('her smiling face'), the surface of something ('the face of a coin'), or an expression ('make a face'). As a verb it means to confront ('face the problem') or to turn toward ('face the window'). 'Face-to-face' means in person.
example_sentence: She faced her fears and decided to speak in front of the audience.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने अपने डर का सामना किया और दर्शकों के सामने बोलने का फैसला किया।

english_meaning: a movable barrier used for entering or exiting a room
definition_simple: A movable panel that opens and closes an entrance.
definition_detailed: 'Door' is a movable barrier at an entrance ('open the door'). 'Doorway' is the opening. 'Doorstep' is the step at the entrance. 'Next door' means the adjacent place. 'Open doors' figuratively means opportunities. 'Door to door' means from one place to another.
example_sentence: She knocked on the door and waited patiently for an answer.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने दरवाजे पर दस्तक दी और धैर्यपूर्वक जवाब का इंतजार किया।

english_meaning: to move on foot at a normal pace
definition_simple: To move on foot at a moderate pace; to take a stroll.
definition_detailed: 'Walk' means to move on foot ('walk to school'), to accompany on foot ('walk the dog'), and as a noun a journey on foot ('go for a walk'). Phrasal verbs: 'walk away', 'walk out', 'walk through'. 'Walk of life' means one's occupation or social status.
example_sentence: She walks to the nearby market every morning for fresh produce.
example_sentence_hindi: वह ताजा उत्पाद के लिए हर सुबह पास के बाजार तक पैदल जाती है।

english_meaning: the condition of being alive; the period between birth and death
definition_simple: The condition that distinguishes organisms from non-living matter; one's existence.
definition_detailed: 'Life' refers to the condition of being alive ('signs of life'), a person's existence ('her life'), the period of time something lasts ('the life of a battery'), and a way of living ('a good life'). Plural 'lives' refers to individual existences. Many compounds: 'lifestyle', 'lifelong', 'wildlife'.
example_sentence: She believes that every life is precious and deserves respect.
example_sentence_hindi: वह मानती है कि हर जीवन अनमोल है और सम्मान का पात्र है।

english_meaning: a thought or suggestion formed in the mind
definition_simple: A thought, plan, or suggestion formed in the mind.
definition_detailed: 'Idea' refers to a mental concept ('have an idea'), a plan ('a good idea'), or an opinion ('no idea'). 'Have no idea' means to be completely unaware. 'That's the idea' confirms understanding. An 'ideal' is a perfect standard. 'Idealism' is devotion to ideals.
example_sentence: She came up with a brilliant idea for improving the team process.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने टीम की प्रक्रिया को बेहतर बनाने के लिए एक शानदार विचार सोचा।

english_meaning: a piece of furniture with a flat top; an organized set of data
definition_simple: A piece of furniture with a flat top used for eating or working; an organized data set.
definition_detailed: 'Table' as a noun means a flat-surfaced furniture piece ('sit at the table'), an organized display of data ('a table of results'), and in British English as a verb means to propose for discussion ('table a motion'). 'Timetable' is a schedule. 'Turn the tables' means to reverse the situation.
example_sentence: She cleared the table after dinner and started washing the dishes.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने रात के खाने के बाद मेज साफ की और बर्तन धोने लगी।

english_meaning: a female parent
definition_simple: A female parent; a woman who has given birth to a child.
definition_detailed: 'Mother' refers to a female parent ('call my mother'), as a title ('Mother Teresa'), or as an adjective meaning main or original ('mother tongue', 'mother country'). 'Motherland' is one's native country. 'Motherly' means caring like a mother. Many cultural and symbolic associations exist.
example_sentence: She calls her mother every evening to talk and catch up.
example_sentence_hindi: वह बात करने और अपडेट लेने के लिए हर शाम अपनी माँ को फोन करती है।

english_meaning: a male parent
definition_simple: A male parent; a man who has children.
definition_detailed: 'Father' refers to a male parent ('her father'), a title for priests ('Father James'), and a creator or originator ('the father of medicine'). 'Fatherland' is one's native country. 'Fatherly' means like a caring father. 'The Founding Fathers' are the founders of the US.
example_sentence: Her father taught her to be strong, kind, and always honest.
example_sentence_hindi: उसके पिता ने उसे मजबूत, दयालु और हमेशा ईमानदार रहना सिखाया।

english_meaning: a person with whom one has a bond of mutual affection
definition_simple: A person with whom one has a bond of affection and trust.
definition_detailed: 'Friend' refers to a person one knows and likes ('her close friend'), a supporter ('a friend of the arts'), and on social media, a connection ('friend request'). 'Friendly' means kind and pleasant. 'Befriend' means to act as a friend to. 'Best friend' is the closest friend.
example_sentence: She introduced her old school friend to all her new colleagues.
example_sentence_hindi: उसने अपने पुराने स्कूल के दोस्त को अपने सभी नए सहयोगियों से मिलवाया।

english_meaning: a deep affection and caring for someone
definition_simple: An intense feeling of deep affection; to feel deep affection for.
definition_detailed: 'Love' as a noun means a deep affection ('love for family'), a romantic passion ('fall in love'), and in sports a score of zero ('love-fifteen' in tennis). As a verb it means to have deep affection for ('I love you') or to greatly enjoy ('she loves reading'). 'Lovely' means pleasant or attractive.
example_sentence: She shows love and kindness to everyone she meets every day.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हर रोज हर उस व्यक्ति को प्यार और दया दिखाती है जिससे वह मिलती है।

english_meaning: the element enabling thought and consciousness; to object to
definition_simple: The faculty of consciousness and thought; to feel concern or objection.
definition_detailed: 'Mind' as a noun refers to the seat of thought and consciousness ('open your mind'), a person's memory ('keep in mind'), and an opinion ('speak your mind'). As a verb it means to object to ('do you mind?'), to pay attention ('mind the gap'), or to take care of ('mind the children'). 'Mind-blowing' means astonishing.
example_sentence: She always keeps an open mind when learning about new ideas.
example_sentence_hindi: वह नए विचारों के बारे में सीखते समय हमेशा खुले दिमाग रखती है।

english_meaning: a series of images during sleep; an aspiration
definition_simple: Images and thoughts experienced during sleep; an aspiration.
definition_detailed: 'Dream' as a noun means mental images during sleep ('a strange dream'), a long-held hope ('her dream is to travel the world'). As a verb it means to experience dreams while sleeping or to imagine ('dream big'). Both 'dreamed' and 'dreamt' are acceptable past forms. 'Daydream' means pleasant fantasizing while awake.
example_sentence: She has always had a dream of starting her own successful business.
example_sentence_hindi: उसका हमेशा से अपना सफल व्यवसाय शुरू करने का सपना रहा है।

english_meaning: freedom from disturbance; a state of tranquility
definition_simple: A state of freedom from conflict, trouble, or disturbance.
definition_detailed: 'Peace' refers to freedom from war ('a peace treaty'), tranquility ('peace of mind'), and harmony ('live in peace'). It is an uncountable noun in most uses. 'Peace of mind' means mental calm. 'Rest in peace (RIP)' is used for the deceased. 'Make peace' means to end a conflict.
example_sentence: She felt a deep sense of peace and joy after meditation.
example_sentence_hindi: ध्यान के बाद उसे गहरी शांति और खुशी की अनुभूति हुई।

english_meaning: a period of sixty minutes
definition_simple: A unit of time equal to sixty minutes.
definition_detailed: 'Hour' is a unit of time consisting of 60 minutes. 'Hours' can mean a long time ('waited for hours') or working hours ('office hours'). '24-hour' means continuous. 'Rush hour' is the busy traffic period. 'After hours' means after official closing time. The adjective 'hourly' means every hour.
example_sentence: She spends at least one hour every day reading something educational.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हर रोज कम से कम एक घंटा कुछ शैक्षणिक पढ़ने में बिताती है।

english_meaning: a period of seven consecutive days
definition_simple: A period of seven days; usually from Monday to Sunday.
definition_detailed: 'Week' is a seven-day period ('this week', 'next week'). 'Weekday' refers to Monday through Friday. 'Weekend' is Saturday and Sunday. 'Weekly' means happening every week. 'Fortnight' (British) means two weeks. 'Week in, week out' means repeatedly every week.
example_sentence: She exercises three times a week to stay healthy and active.
example_sentence_hindi: वह स्वस्थ और सक्रिय रहने के लिए सप्ताह में तीन बार व्यायाम करती है।

english_meaning: in accordance with fact or reality; genuine
definition_simple: Corresponding to reality; honest; genuine.
definition_detailed: 'True' means accurate or factual ('a true story'), loyal ('a true friend'), genuine ('true feelings'), and in geometry exactly level. 'Come true' means to happen as hoped. 'True-blue' means genuinely loyal. 'Truly' is the adverb. 'Truth' is the noun.
example_sentence: She always tells the true story even if it makes people uncomfortable.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हमेशा सच्ची कहानी बताती है चाहे इससे लोग असहज क्यों न हों।

english_meaning: a paid position of employment; a task
definition_simple: A regular paid occupation; a specific piece of work.
definition_detailed: 'Job' refers to paid employment ('she got a new job'), a specific task ('do a good job'), and responsibility ('it's your job'). Idiom: 'job well done' means good work. 'Jobless' means unemployed. 'Job market' refers to the availability of employment.
example_sentence: She got a great job at a technology company after graduation.
example_sentence_hindi: स्नातक होने के बाद उसे एक तकनीकी कंपनी में एक बेहतरीन नौकरी मिली।

english_meaning: a male child in relation to his parents
definition_simple: A male child in relation to his parents; a boy.
definition_detailed: 'Son' refers to a male child ('her son is ten'), a male member of a group ('son of the church'), and in religious usage ('the Son of God'). 'Son-in-law' is the husband of one's child. 'Grandson' is a son's son. 'My son' is a form of address to a young man.
example_sentence: She is so proud of her son who works as a doctor.
example_sentence_hindi: वह अपने बेटे पर बहुत गर्व करती है जो एक डॉक्टर के रूप में काम करता है।

english_meaning: the period from midnight or dawn to noon
definition_simple: The time from dawn until the middle of the day.
definition_detailed: 'Morning' refers to the period from dawn (or midnight in common usage) to noon. 'Good morning' is a standard greeting. 'Morning rush' refers to heavy traffic in the AM. 'This morning' refers to the current day's morning. 'Morning person' is someone who is alert early in the day.
example_sentence: She takes a brisk walk every morning before starting her work.
example_sentence_hindi: वह अपना काम शुरू करने से पहले हर सुबह तेज चलती है।

english_meaning: at a higher level or position; more than
definition_simple: At or to a higher position; more than a specific amount.
definition_detailed: 'Above' indicates a higher position ('the shelf above'), a greater amount ('above average'), and seniority ('above your rank'). As an adverb it means 'higher up' ('the sky above'). 'Above board' means honest and legal. 'Above all' means most importantly.
example_sentence: She always aims to perform above the expectations of her managers.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हमेशा अपने प्रबंधकों की अपेक्षाओं से ऊपर प्रदर्शन करने का लक्ष्य रखती है।

english_meaning: to take place; to come about by chance
definition_simple: To occur; to take place without being planned.
definition_detailed: 'Happen' means to occur ('what happened?'), to come about by chance ('it happened to rain'), and 'happen to' means to come across ('I happened to see her'). 'Happenings' refers to events. It is usually intransitive (no object). 'Whatever happens' means regardless of outcomes.
example_sentence: She didn't know what would happen after she submitted the report.
example_sentence_hindi: उसे नहीं पता था कि रिपोर्ट जमा करने के बाद क्या होगा।

english_meaning: an account of events; a narrative
definition_simple: A narrative of events, either real or imagined.
definition_detailed: 'Story' refers to a narrative of events ('tell a story'), a piece of fiction ('a short story'), a news report ('front-page story'), a floor of a building ('a two-story house'), and slang for a lie ('that's just a story'). 'Story line' is the plot of a narrative.
example_sentence: She read her daughter a bedtime story every night before sleeping.
example_sentence_hindi: वह हर रात सोने से पहले अपनी बेटी को एक सोने की कहानी पढ़ती थी।

english_meaning: having great physical power; solid; intense
definition_simple: Having great power, force, or intensity; not easily broken.
definition_detailed: 'Strong' describes physical strength ('a strong person'), structural soundness ('a strong foundation'), intensity ('a strong smell'), ability ('a strong argument'), and concentration ('strong coffee'). Comparative: 'stronger'; superlative: 'strongest'. Noun: 'strength'. 'Stronghold' is a fortified place.
example_sentence: She has a strong will and never gives up when things get difficult.
example_sentence_hindi: उसकी दृढ़ इच्छाशक्ति है और जब चीजें मुश्किल हो जाती हैं तो वह कभी हार नहीं मानती।

english_meaning: to accept something as true; to have faith in
definition_simple: To accept something as true or real; to have confidence in.
definition_detailed: 'Believe' means to accept as true ('I believe you'), to think or suppose ('I believe she's right'), to have religious faith ('believe in God'), and to have confidence in ('I believe in you'). It is a stative verb and rarely used in continuous form. 'Believe it or not' introduces surprising facts.
example_sentence: She truly believes that hard work and persistence always pay off.
example_sentence_hindi: वह सच में मानती है कि मेहनत और दृढ़ता हमेशा फल देती है।

english_meaning: able to happen; capable of being done
definition_simple: Able to happen or be achieved; within the realm of capability.
definition_detailed: 'Possible' means capable of happening ('it is possible') or achievable ('make it possible'). 'Possibly' is the adverb. 'Possibility' is the noun. 'Impossible' is the antonym. The phrase 'as soon as possible (ASAP)' means at the earliest opportunity. 'If possible' means if it can be done.
example_sentence: She tries to exercise as often as possible during the busy week.
example_sentence_hindi: वह व्यस्त सप्ताह के दौरान जितना संभव हो उतनी बार व्यायाम करने की कोशिश करती है।
